title: Wood Mackenzie Lens Platform
shortDescription: An enterprise SaaS platform that delivers market intelligence, sustainability insights, and advanced analytics for the energy, chemicals, metals, and mining industries.
overview: The Wood Mackenzie Lens Platform is an enterprise SaaS application that provides market intelligence, sustainability analytics, and business insights through interactive dashboards and data-rich applications.
As part of the development team, I build scalable micro-frontend applications using React, TypeScript, GraphQL, Redux, and modern frontend technologies.
The platform helps global organizations analyze complex datasets, monitor sustainability metrics, and make data-driven business decisions through secure, high-performance web applications.
problemSolved: Enterprise customers needed a scalable platform capable of visualizing large datasets, delivering sustainability insights, and supporting business-critical decision making with excellent performance and usability.
myResponsibilities: Develop customer-facing features using React and TypeScript.
Build reusable and scalable UI components.
Develop and maintain GraphQL integrations.
Optimize frontend performance and application responsiveness.
Implement LaunchDarkly feature flags for controlled feature releases.
Write unit tests using Jest.
Write end-to-end tests using Playwright.
Participate in code reviews and architectural discussions.
Collaborate with designers, product managers, and backend engineers.
Contribute to CI/CD deployment workflows.
keyAchievements: Built scalable customer-facing enterprise SaaS features.
Improved frontend performance and responsiveness.
Developed reusable UI components for faster development.
Implemented LaunchDarkly feature flags for safe deployments.

title: Food Bazaar E-Commerce Application
shortDescription: A full-stack e-commerce platform for online food ordering and delivery, featuring responsive user interfaces, real-time order tracking, secure payments, and an administrative dashboard for efficient business management.
overview: Food Bazaar is a modern full-stack e-commerce platform that enables customers to browse products, place orders, track deliveries in real time, and complete secure online payments through a responsive web application.

As a Full Stack Software Engineer, I contributed to both the frontend and backend using React, Next.js, Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB. My responsibilities included building scalable features, integrating REST APIs, implementing authentication, and optimizing application performance.

The platform includes customer-facing capabilities such as personalized profiles, order tracking, daily offers, secure payment processing, and an administrative dashboard for managing restaurants, orders, inventory, and customers.
Throughout the project, I collaborated with designers, QA engineers, and backend developers while following Agile practices, CI/CD pipelines, and modern software engineering standards.
problemSolved: The business required a scalable online food ordering platform capable of providing a fast, secure, and responsive shopping experience while simplifying restaurant management, order processing, inventory management, and customer operations.
myResponsibilities: Developed responsive frontend pages using React and Next.js.
Built backend services using Node.js and Express.js.
Designed and integrated RESTful APIs.
Implemented user authentication and authorization.
Developed reusable UI components.
Integrated order management workflows.
Optimized frontend performance and loading speed.
Improved responsiveness across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams during feature development.
Participated in Agile ceremonies, code reviews, and deployment activities.
keyAchievements: Delivered production-ready e-commerce features.
Developed reusable frontend components.
Improved application performance and responsiveness.
Built scalable REST APIs for business workflows.

Delivered a responsive user experience across multiple devices.

title: Point of Sale - Service Industry
shortDescription: A cloud-based Point of Sale (POS) solution designed for service-oriented businesses such as salons, spas, automobile service centers, repair shops, and other appointment-based businesses.
overview: The Service Industry POS is a comprehensive business management platform that helps service-based businesses streamline appointments, billing, customer management, employee management, and payment processing.
I contributed as a Full Stack Software Engineer, developing responsive frontend interfaces, backend APIs, reusable components, and business workflows that improved operational efficiency.

The application supports appointment scheduling, invoicing, customer relationship management, employee scheduling, service history, inventory tracking, and real-time reporting through an intuitive dashboard.
Throughout the project, I collaborated with business stakeholders and development teams to deliver scalable features while maintaining code quality and application performance.

title: AI Portfolio Assistant
shortDescription: An intelligent AI-powered portfolio assistant that helps recruiters and hiring managers explore my experience, projects, skills, and resume through natural language conversations.
overview: AI Portfolio Assistant is an interactive chatbot integrated into my personal portfolio to provide recruiters with an easier way to learn about my professional background.

Instead of manually browsing pages, visitors can ask natural language questions such as 'Tell me about yourself', 'Show your React projects', or 'Why should we hire you?', and receive contextual responses instantly.

The application uses a React frontend with a Node.js and Express backend. Portfolio knowledge is organized into structured JSON and Markdown files, allowing the assistant to answer consistently while remaining easy to maintain and extend.

The project was designed with future LLM integration in mind, making it easy to upgrade from a rule-based assistant to a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architecture using embeddings and vector databases.
problemSolved: Recruiters often spend only a few minutes reviewing a portfolio. This assistant helps them quickly discover relevant information through conversational interactions instead of navigating multiple pages manually.
myResponsibilities: Designed the complete application architecture.
Built the chatbot interface using React.
Developed backend APIs using Node.js and Express.js.
Designed a structured knowledge base using JSON and Markdown.
Implemented intent detection and response generation.
Built contextual navigation actions such as opening projects, resume, and contact sections.
Implemented conversation history management.
Developed reusable UI components.
Designed responsive layouts for desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.
Prepared the architecture for future LLM and RAG integration.
keyAchievements: Designed and built the complete application independently.
Created a structured AI knowledge base from my professional experience.
Built a conversational interface specifically for recruiters.
Designed a scalable backend architecture ready for LLM integration.
Improved portfolio discoverability through conversational navigation.
interviewHighlights: Designed an AI-powered portfolio assistant from scratch.
Built both frontend and backend independently.
Created a structured knowledge base using JSON and Markdown.
Designed the system to support future LLM and RAG integration.
Focused on recruiter experience and conversational UX.
Applied AI concepts without relying entirely on external AI services.
